subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and Testament! Today there existeth no greater praise than this, nor any more wondrous commendation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی العهد و المیثاق الیوم نعتی اعظم از این و ستایشی ابدع از این نه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @contention and conflict, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Hands of the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @call to action
